box_threshold.description:
Threshold for bbox generation
to small = more false positives/ noise, background artifacts, or partial text.
to big = false negatives/ actual text that had slightly lower confidence is discarded.
allowed range is from 0.0 to 1.0

detect_size.description:
Text detector used for creating a text mask from an image
TODO: guide

text_threshold.description:
Threshold for text detection
smaller values = more detections + more false positives
larger values = fewer detections + more false negatives
allowed range is from 0.0 to 1.0

unclip_ratio.description:
How much to extend text skeleton to form bounding box
smaller values = smaller text skeleton.
to small = more false negatives/partial detections
larger values = bigger text skeleton detections .
to big =  more false positives/Multiple close text lines/words may be merged
Suggested values:
- `1.0 – 1.5`: Use for tight text layouts, well-separated characters or lines, high-resolution images.
- `1.5 – 2.0`: General-purpose setting. Provides a good balance between recall and precision.
- `2.0 – 2.5`: Use when text is thin, faint, or sparse—e.g., scanned documents or light fonts.
- `> 2.5`: Rarely needed. May cause nearby text instances to merge or overlap.

detector.description: Text detector used for creating a text mask from an image, DO NOT use craft for manga, it\'s not designed for it

preprocessor.description: General Options to apply before detection

inpaint_color.description: If no ai is used for inpainting than use this color

inpainting_size.description: Size of image used for inpainting (too large will result in OOM)

mask.description: this is not the mask that is given to the inpainter, but what part of the inpainted image should be extracted(overlayed on the orignal image)

oneOf.description: Crimean Crimean Tatar; Crimean Crimean Turkish
Luo language (Kenya and Tanzania)|Luo (Kenya and Tanzania)
The detected mask needs to be refined to remove artifacts when inpainting. Its alsmost a perfect match to the actual letters, but does contain some noise
The refined mask is used for inpainting, but a bit more dilated & without the noise
this is cuts out the parts which are in both mask and refined mask(filters noise)

dilation_offset.description:
By how much to extend the text mask to remove left-over text pixels of the original image.
bigger means the mask gets extended further

furigana.description: Mask gets extended to the right/top to cover furigana characters

ignore_bubble.description: The threshold for ignoring text in non bubble areas, with valid values ranging from 1 to 50, does not ignore others. Recommendation 5 to 10. If it is too low, normal bubble areas may be ignored, and if it is too large, non bubble areas may be considered normal bubbles

kernel_size.description:
Set the convolution kernel size of the text erasure area to completely clean up text residues
bigger means the mask gets extended further

filter_text.description: Filter regions by their text with a regex. Example usage: '.*badtext.*'

min_text_length.description: Minimum text length of a text region

ocr.description: Optical character recognition (OCR) model to use

prob.description: Minimum probability of a text region to be considered valid. If None, uses the model default

use_mocr_merge.description:
Use bbox merge when Manga OCR inference.
todo: not used

auto_rotate.description: Rotate the image for detection to prefer vertical textlines. Might improve detection.

gamma_correct.description: Applies gamma correction for detection. Might improve detection.

invert.description: Invert the image colors for detection. Might improve detection.

rotate.description: Rotate the image for detection. Might improve detection.

filter_lang.description: Filters out languages that should not be translated
